description: High-top styling on the classic suede shoe, this woodland ankle boot is set to become your mainstay while braving the great outdoors. Aggressive outsole with lugs, plush textured upper and tough overlays make this an adventurer's sartorial dream. Wear these with your cargo shorts or military pants and your favourite polo T-shirt. Upper Textured leather and suede upper with strategically placed overlays for added comfort Padded tongue and collar Four-hole lace ups with metal rings Padded insole for in-step comfort Perforated at the collar for comfort Midsole Rubber midsole Outsole Dual density TPU outsole with multidirectional lugs for grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not machine wash
